One Model, Three Modalities: ByteDance Releases Lance for Image and Video Understanding, Generation, and...
Nous Research releases CNA, a method that steers LLM behavior by ablating sparse MLP circuits without training or weight modification.
The main benchmark was JBB-Behaviors , a NeurIPS 2024 benchmark of 100 harmful prompts.
Only 8–29% of individual neurons overlap between base and instruct model circuits - fine-tuning rewires the neurons while keeping the late-layer structure intact.
Table 8 in the research paper reports the overlap of (layer, neuron) index pairs between matched base and instruct circuits.
Selected results from Table 3 of the research paper : Not all models exceeded 50% relative reduction - Llama-3.2-3B and Qwen2.5-3B showed smaller drops.
